text.title: cloud-run-jobs Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cloud-run-jobs as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Processing all items in every task without using CLOUD_RUN_TASK_INDEX for partitioning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All tasks process the same data N times. With 100 tasks and 10,000 items, 1,000,000 items are processed instead of 10,000. Results are duplicated N times; cost multiplies by task_count.
